experiments.title: Chlorambucil Analogs — EGFR Target Study
experiments.hypothesis: Exploring structural neighbors of Chlorambucil to find improved alkylating agents with better EGFR binding and reduced toxicity.

experiments.title: Sulfonamide Series — Hemoglobin Binding
experiments.hypothesis: Investigating sulfonamide derivatives for potential hemoglobin interactions in sickle cell drug discovery.

experiments.title: KRAS G12C Inhibitor Search
experiments.hypothesis: Using pyrene as a scaffold seed to find flat aromatic systems that could fit the KRAS G12C allosteric pocket.

comments.body: Great work Alice! Have you checked the Tanimoto similarity of candidates 2 and 3? They look very similar to each other.
The DTI score on candidate 1 is impressive. I'd suggest also running it against the EGFR kinase domain specifically.
Really interesting scaffold choice. Sulfonamides are well-tolerated — good Lipinski scores on most candidates too!
